arts.ttl: Bayern Munich's Alphonso Davies on regaining the Bundesliga title, Vincent Kompany, Jamal Musiala and more
arts.sum: Against Gladbach, who are a good team, right after being away from playing football for 10 days, we know it’s going to be a tough game. But overall, we know we’re going to go into that game with the same mindset we had in every single game we played last year."

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany calls for improvement from his Bayern Munich squad
arts.sum: Bayern Munich may be sitting four points clear of Bayer Leverkusen heading into the opening round of fixtures in 2025, but Vincent Kompany is wary of the threat that reigning…

arts.ttl: Decision on Alphonso Davies’ Bayern Munich future to be made next week
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies is the subject of interest from Real Madrid amid an expiring contract at the end of the season, but the Canadian defender appears to be closer to signing…

arts.ttl: Report: Star youngster Jonathan Asp Jensen could join Bayern Munich partner club SpVgg Unterhaching to save them from relegation
arts.sum: Liga might do Asp Jensen some good, how good is it to send a young talent to a club as unstable as Unterhaching are at the moment? Since the cooperation partner SpVgg Unterhaching lacks goal threat, the possibility of loaning some Bayern talents is being discussed.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Could Bayern Munich sell Leroy Sané to Liverpool right now?; Mo Salah tempted by PSG?; Manchester City tells Eintracht Frankfurt it wants Omar Marmoush; Niclas Füllkrug to Juventus?; Arsenal eyeing Bukayo Saka replacement?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich could accept offers of £20-25 million for Man City target Leroy Sane if he does not sign a new deal, sources have told Football Insider. Manchester City hope to re-sign Bayern Munich winger Leroy Sané during the January transfer window .

arts.ttl: Report: Thomas Müller would need a pay cut to stay at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Could Bayern Munich keep veteran Thomas Müller around for another year? Awesome, then check out the Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show on Patreon, Spotify, or below:

arts.ttl: Right in place? Bayern Munich planning to keep using Konrad Laimer at right-back
arts.sum: Per information from kicker (via @iMiaSanMia_GER ), Bayern is planning on using Laimer at right-back quite often moving forward, which is where he has most often been deployed by Kompany so far this season. In addition to the injury to Stanišić that has kept him out of most of this season already, Eric Dier is likely set to be leaving Bayern at the end of the season, so Stanišić will be utilized at center-back as well as right-back.

arts.ttl: Report details Bayern Munich star Jamal Musiala’s latest contract demands
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala wants to extend his Bayern contract and his management is expecting an agreement with the club by February at the latest. Bayern Munich may have hit a snag in contract talks with star Jamal Musiala, but it is reportedly expected to be only a speed bump on the way to completion.

arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Monchengladbach vs. Bayern Munich - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Borussia Monchengladbach and Bayern Munich, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich will have to pony up to keep Joshua Kimmich
arts.sum: Kimmich is self-represented (most recently meeting with club executives himself on Wednesday ) but the quality of his work says it all. If Bayern Munich is thinking about cutting costs, it will probably not happen with midfielder Joshua Kimmich’s next contract.
